sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62545" key="lepto/trixos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτό-τρῐχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n62545.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λεπτόθριξ</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
